parsed_review.summary:
CP00-790 is a descriptor-only RP26 Enterprise SaaS Hardening continuation pack (risk B, 40 units, RP26.P01.M04.S07-RP26.P01.M06.S04) and its pack-level production_ready (descriptor-verified) claim is supported by independent read-only inspection.

Implementation: packages/enterprise/src/{registry,service,validators,sso,scim,index}.js build EnterpriseSaasCp790PermissionAuditFixtureDescriptor as a frozen, descriptor-only projection sourced from the CP789 descriptor. ENTERPRISE_SAAS_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION spreads ~50 false runtime/write/leak flags onto every result; validateDescriptor + validateSso/ScimConnectionDescriptor actively reject descriptor_only!=true, runtime_execution!=false, any tenant/SSO/SCIM/secret/key payload, cross-tenant routing, permission-decision-detail or audit-event-body exposure, and enterprise-trust claims. Authority boundary is enforced (claude_is_final_approval=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false).

Coverage: manifest plan_binding_snapshot carries exactly 40 units; deliverable distribution {implementation:22, ui:6, fixture:2, test:6, hermes_evidence:2, claude_review:2} and micro_title distribution {Secondary Workflow Slice:14, Permission And Audit Binding:22, Synthetic Fixture Set:4} match the prompt baseline, CP790_REQUIREMENTS, and the section-row slices (PACKAGE_MODEL_ROWS.slice(6,20)/full/PACKAGE_TYPE_ROWS.slice(0,4)). Plan live_state pins CP00-790 with the forward queue starting at CP00-791/RP26.P01.M06.S05; validator/test correctly fall back to the manifest snapshot for the unit list.

Contract/docs: contracts/enterprise-saas-hardening-contract.json has current_pack/latest_pack=CP00-790, latest_projection=EnterpriseSaasCp790PermissionAuditFixtureDescriptor, validation.valid=true, and README.md#cp00-790 documentation entry exists.

Local validation (docs/closeout-packs/cp00-790/command-evidence.json): all 14 commands exit 0 - closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, npm test (3055 pass / 0 fail), validate (product contract 9/9), spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate (confirms claude read-only/effort=max), rp00:control-plane:validate (control-plane production_ready), critical-rps:validate, rp26:validate, rp26:enterprise-saas:validate (pack CP00-790, unit_count 40, 3 mandatory artifacts), and git diff --check.

Boundaries: Hermes usage is deterministic packet/receipt only (emits_runtime_receipt=false, writes_product_state=false, receipt_shape descriptor_only_enterprise_saas_no_write); runtime_ready=false and no enterprise-trust claim, so promoting at the descriptor layer does not weaken runtime/enterprise-trust gates. Review hardening passes: auth preflight succeeded (valid JSON, 1436 bytes), tools limited to Read/Grep/Glob, no prior invalid review attempts, and no stale raw-output/receipt present. The pending state of construction-inspection/adjudication/claude-review-result is the expected pre-receipt scaffold this review fills. Claude remains a read-only independent reviewer, not final approver; human approval for runtime/enterprise-trust remains outside this receipt. No P0-P3 findings.
